heading: Deposit of fees collected under regulations relating to “Smokey Bear”; availability
label: 580p–2 Deposit of fees collected under regulations relating to “Smokey Bear”; availability
text: The Secretary of Agriculture shall deposit into a special account to be available for furthering the nationwide forest-fire prevention campaign all fees collected under regulations promulgated by him relating to “Smokey Bear”.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 31, Money and Finance, by , , .section 488a of Title 31Pub. L. 97–258, § 196 Stat. 877Sept. 13, 1982
